$comment: AC-LLM-EXTRACT single source of truth for the model id and endpoint shape. The model id is a USER-SPECIFIED value (agreed_contract allowed_assumptions: GPT-5.4 model id is config; endpoint/model real existence is NOT a runtime verification target — logic wiring only). Swap `model` here to change models without touching code (abstraction-by-config). `endpoint_template` uses {base} which is filled at runtime from the openai-oauth child's ready URL (http://127.0.0.1:<port>/v1).

degradation.on_no_auth: View, edit, and save remain fully available offline. Extraction, classification, and translation are disabled until an OAuth subscription session is reachable.
degradation.on_call_failure: The error is surfaced verbatim; the app does not crash and the existing deterministic candidates / original text remain visible and editable.
